title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Puravankara

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Puravankara
jsonLd.description:
We at Puravankara are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Puravankara:
Puravankara is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puravankara!
